items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【LV x TM ALL IN BB Handbag】 m13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【LV x TM ALL IN BB Handbag】 m13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This All In BB handbag conveys the playful style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series through dynamic details. Monogram Multicolore canvas presents the vibrant rainbow tones from the artist's brush, while the nameplate features a bow and lock decoration. The adjustable calfskin handle and leather shoulder strap allow you to switch between hand-carry, shoulder carry, and crossbody wear.
Size: 18 x 12 x 16 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨M13404 White Multicolore Chain Clutch New Season LV x TM POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag This Pochette Accessoires handbag is crafted from coated canvas, interpreting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series with a colorful Monogram pattern. Calfskin trim and dazzling metalware accentuate exquisite details, while the detachable shoulder strap and chain offer flexible carrying options. 13 x 4 x 22 cm.

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【M83500】 This Lou wallet is made of Monogram jacquard fabric, featuring a tweed-like appearance and texture. Natural leather trim complements this design, which is characterized by its square shape and two types of closures. Despite its small size, this wallet features a generous coin pocket, a bill compartment, and six card slots.

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Coin Purse Wallet】 M82957 Light Blue (Denim)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Coin Purse Wallet】 M82957 Light Blue (Denim)
Crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, this Zippy coin purse features contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard fabric technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. Compact yet spacious, it features two large compartments, multiple pockets, and credit card slots when unzipped.
Size: 11*8.5*2cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Coin Purse Wallet】 M82957 Light Blue (Denim)
Crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, this Zippy coin purse features contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard fabric technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. Compact yet spacious, it features two large compartments, multiple pockets, and credit card slots when unzipped.
Size: 11*8.5*2cm

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Zip Wallet】 M82958 Light Blue (Denim)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Zip Wallet】 M82958 Light Blue (Denim)
This zippy zip wallet reinterprets the Monogram jacquard fabric with a woven technique, recreating Louis Vuitton's iconic Monogram Dld pattern and creating a stonewashed effect. This classic wallet features calfskin trim and is known for its secure full-zip design. It includes three large compartments, multiple pockets, and 12 credit card slots.
Size: 19.5*10.5*2.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 【Zippy Zip Wallet】 M82958 Light Blue (Denim)
This zippy zip wallet reinterprets the Monogram jacquard fabric with a woven technique, recreating Louis Vuitton's iconic Monogram Dld pattern and creating a stonewashed effect. This classic wallet features calfskin trim and is known for its secure full-zip design. It includes three large compartments, multiple pockets, and 12 credit card slots.
Size: 19.5*10.5*2.5cm

items.name_en: Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 📷 [Zippy Wallet Zipper Long Wallet] m23161 Blue Denim / Cherry
items.name_cn:
Top-tier exclusive authentic photos 📷 [Zippy Wallet Zipper Long Wallet] m23161 Blue Denim / Cherry
As part of the celebration of the second edition of the cross-category Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, the basic Zippy wallet is playfully revisited. Made from the House's iconic Monogram denim, the enlarged cherry pattern introduces a joyful detail to the artist's kawaii aesthetic. It is secured with a gold zipper and features multiple compartments for cards, coins, and bills.
Dimensions: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Top-tier factory original with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory original with full packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Red heart five-grid embroidery ✨
 This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Embroidered throughout with Pietro Ruffo's design, highlighting the classic beauty of the butterfly, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model:D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm,📸 Exclusive real-life photos🎞✨ with original packaging gift box🎁]

items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
🖤 Medium Lady D-Joy Handbag 'Matte Black'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilted detail with classic diagonal quilting and exquisite stitching. A matching metal D.I.O.R. charm adds an elegant touch. The medium size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9250
Dimensions: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits one iPhone and other accessories
